response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying to a Junior/Mid-level role, creating significant overqualification risk and likely salary/expectation mismatch. Technical skills (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Kubernetes) strongly exceed requirements, but the role demands high on-site presence while the candidate is based in São Paulo, Brazil. Retention risk is high and the seniority gap suggests the role would not provide adequate growth or compensation.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple companies
Hands-on with AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and full-stack architecture
Track record of clean code practices (TDD, pairing, CI/CD)
concerns: Severe overqualification — Staff/Senior level for an entry-level role
Location mismatch: São Paulo vs. high on-site presence requirement
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js exposure; primary DB experience is MongoDB
